PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi s1,zero,5      00000000010100000000010010010011
0x0004		addi s2,zero,0      00000000000000000000100100010011
0x0008		addi s3,zero,1      00000000000100000000100110010011
0x000c		addi s4,zero,256    00010000000000000000101000010011
0x0010		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x0014		addi s3,s3,1        00000000000110011000100110010011
0x0018		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x001c		addi s3,s3,1        00000000000110011000100110010011
0x0020		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x0024		addi s3,s3,1        00000000000110011000100110010011
0x0028		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x002c		addi s3,s3,1        00000000000110011000100110010011
0x0030		add s2,s2,s3        00000001001110010000100100110011
0x0034		sw s2,0(s4)         00000001001010100010000000100011
0x0038		lw a0,0(s4)         00000000000010100010010100000011
0x003c		addi sp,sp,-8       11111111100000010000000100010011
0x0040		sw s2,4(sp)         00000001001000010010001000100011
0x0044		lw t0,4(sp)         00000000010000010010001010000011
0x0048		slt t1,zero,t0      00000000010100000010001100110011
0x004c		beq t1,zero,0       00000000000000110000000001100011
0x0050		addi sp,sp,8        00000000100000010000000100010011
0x0054		jalr zero,ra,0      00000000000000001000000001100111
0x0058		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
